title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Supertech - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Supertech - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Supertech has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Supertech:
Supertech is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Supertech!
